---
name: 💡 Feature Request / Content Suggestion
about: Suggest a new cheatsheet, methodology, tool, or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: SimplyLouie
---

## 🎯 What are you requesting?
Select the type of contribution you're suggesting:

- [ ] 📜 New Cheatsheet
- [ ] 📚 New Methodology
- [ ] 🛠️ New Tool / Script
- [ ] ✏️ Improvement to existing content
- [ ] 🔧 Code improvement to an existing tool

## 📝 Description
A clear description of what you'd like added or changed.

## 🧠 Why is this valuable?
Explain how this fits the SimplySec mission of keeping security simple and educational.
(e.g., "There's no Hashcat reference in the cheatsheets, but it pairs naturally with the existing linux-privesc guide.")

## 🗒️ Suggested Outline (Optional)
If you have a specific structure in mind, share it here. E.g.:

```
# Hashcat Cheatsheet
## Common Modes
## Attack Types
## Wordlists
```

## 📎 References / Sources
Any external resources, CVEs, or documentation that should inform this content.
